files.patch:
@@ -1,53 +0,0 @@
-✅ EVENT STORE PERSISTENCE IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE
-====================================================
-
-Implementation Date: 2026-01-04
-ADR Reference: ADR-007 (Event Sourcing for State Changes)
-Status: PRODUCTION READY
-
-FILES CREATED:
---------------
-1. domain-events.ts           (556 lines) - 23 domain event types
-2. event-store.ts             (588 lines) - Core event store implementation
-3. projections.ts             (561 lines) - 3 projection implementations
-4. event-store.test.ts        (387 lines) - 20+ comprehensive tests
-5. example-usage.ts           (293 lines) - Working demonstration
-6. index.ts                   (74 lines)  - Module exports
-7. README.md                  (352 lines) - Complete documentation
-8. IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md  (388 lines) - Implementation details
-9. QUICK_REFERENCE.md         (470 lines) - Quick reference guide
-
-TOTAL: 3,669 lines (all files under 600 lines)
-
-ADR-007 REQUIREMENTS:
----------------------
-✅ Event Store with append(), getEvents(), getEventsByType(), replay()
-✅ Domain events for agent, task, memory, swarm (23 event types)
-✅ Projections: AgentStateProjection, TaskHistoryProjection, MemoryIndexProjection
-✅ SQLite persistence with cross-platform sql.js support
-✅ Event versioning and snapshots
-✅ Comprehensive test coverage (20+ tests)
-✅ Complete documentation and examples
-
-KEY FEATURES:
--------------
-✅ Append-only event log
-✅ Automatic versioning per aggregate
-✅ Advanced event filtering and queries
-✅ Event replay for projections
-✅ Snapshot optimization
-✅ Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux)
-✅ Auto-persist to disk
-✅ Statistics and monitoring
-✅ TypeScript strict mode
-✅ All files < 600 lines
-
-READY FOR:
-----------
-✅ Integration into V3 swarm coordinator
-✅ Production deployment
-✅ Further extension and enhancement
-
----
-Implementation completed successfully.
-Module location: /workspaces/claude-flow/v3/@claude-flow/shared/src/events/
